title: Cisco India is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Cisco India is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Cisco India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Full Stack Developer for our Kochi operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Cisco India:
Cisco India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in SQL

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Cisco India!
